Romanian mafia.description: The Romanian mafia is a category of organized crime groups composed of Romanian citizens or diaspora members. Active primarily in Romania, Italy, Spain, the United Kingdom, and North America, they engage in human trafficking, drug trafficking, prostitution, cybercrime, and other illicit activities. Known for ATM skimming and major scams, they have expanded across Europe and the Americas, with some groups forming alliances with Mexican cartels. The groups are horizontally organized, with leaders called 'Nașu'.

'Ndrina Valle.description: The Valle clan, also known as the Valle-Lampada clan, is a 'Ndrangheta family originally from Reggio Calabria, Italy, that established itself in Vigevano and Cisliano in the 1980s. Allied with the Lampada and De Stefano families, they are active in real estate, gambling, and restaurant businesses. The clan faced arrests in the 1990s and had assets confiscated, including a restaurant property later assigned to the municipality of Cisliano for social reuse.

GTA gang.description: The GTA gang was a violent gang of murderers and terrorists based near Moscow, Russia, formed in March 2012 by Ibaydullo Subkhanov to train soldiers for ISIL. They robbed and murdered motorists on the M-4 highway using caltrops, and were responsible for 17 murders. The gang was captured in a police raid on 6 November 2014, with Subkhanov killed.

Cártel del Noreste.description: Mexican criminal and terrorist organization formed in 2015 as a split from Los Zetas after the capture of Omar Treviño Morales. Based in Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, it controls that city and operates in several Mexican states. Its activities include drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, human trafficking, and money laundering. In February 2025, it was designated a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department.

Downtown Gang.description: The Downtown Gang was a criminal organization based in Galveston, Texas, founded by Johnny Jack Nounes around 1920. It dominated organized crime on the island during Prohibition, engaging in bootlegging, gambling, and other illegal activities. The gang was a rival of the Beach Gang and had connections with the Chicago Outfit. It declined and disbanded around 1935.

Clan dei Casamonica.description: A Roma mafia organization of Romani origin, based in Rome and Lazio, Italy. Formed by the Casamonica and Spada families from Abruzzo and Molise who settled in Rome in the late 1930s. The clan expanded through marriages with other Romani families and alliances with other criminal groups, notably the Banda della Magliana. It controls various illegal activities in Rome's suburbs and Ostia.

edges.evidence_quote: seis miembros del tren de Aragua en Chile que pertenecían al clan conocido como 'La Hermandad'

descriptions: Lazy Gents are an early rival of the Gaylords.
edges.evidence_quote: Among their earliest rivals were the C-Notes, Lazy Gents, and Playboys.

descriptions: The Caia-Laganà-Gioffrè faction split into Caia-Gioffrè and Laganà, entering conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: successivamente sono entrati in conflitto scindendosi in Caia-Gioffrè e Laganà

descriptions: Latin Counts named after Polish Counts.
edges.evidence_quote: inspired by the Polish Counts gang that operated in the nearby Back of the Yards community

descriptions: Angelo La Barbera defied the Commission's authority, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Angelo La Barbera refused to recognize the authority of the Commission over his family altogether.

descriptions: Salvatore La Barbera, leader of the Palermo Centro family, was a member of the Commission.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore La Barbera became a member of the first Sicilian Mafia Commission when it was set up somewhere in 1958.

descriptions: Carlo Gambino of the Gambino family blocked La Barbera's heroin smuggling and threatened him.
edges.evidence_quote: La Barbera tried to smuggle heroin from Mexico into the US, but was stopped by Carlo Gambino... who threatened to kill him if he would proceed.

descriptions: The La Barbera family and the Greco family were on opposite sides of the First Mafia War.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict erupted over an underweight shipment of heroin... between clans allied with the Grecos... and clans allied with the La Barberas.

Dömötör-Kolompár criminal organization.description: A Canadian human trafficking ring composed of an extended Romani family from Pápa, Hungary, that moved to Canada en masse and applied for refugee status. Based in Hamilton, Ontario, the organization lured up to 19 people from Hungary starting in 2008 and forced them into unfree labor in construction without pay. The ring was dismantled after arrests in 2010, with members convicted and deported.

descriptions: Corleonesi opposed Rimi clan by backing their rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The emerging Corleonesi Mafia clan at this point backed the Minores and Buccellatos against the Rimis and Badalamentis

descriptions: Minore clan had a fierce rivalry with Rimi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Both the Minore and Buccellato clan developed a fierce rivalry with the Rimi Mafia clan
